title: IDEA HOME Washing Line Rope 20m - Clothes Lines for Outside Heavy Duty – Plastic Washing Lines Outdoor - Robust Clothes Line made of Polyester Core and Plastic Coating, Assorted Colours
features: Durable: This clothesline is coated with clear PVC, ensuring exceptional strength and resilience. Its synthetic cord reinforcement guarantees outstanding durability, making it perfect for prolonged outdoor and indoor use.
Long-lasting Design: With a robust core, this clotheslines is weatherproof and UV-resistant, providing longevity in various conditions.

Convenient: The generous 20-meter length of this clothes line rope provides ample space for hanging multiple garments at once. Experience the convenience of efficiently air-drying your laundry without compromising on space or tangles.
Versatile: Whether you need a reliable clothes rope for your backyard or within your home, this product is designed for both indoor and outdoor applications.
Product available in 5 colours. The colour will be sent at random.
description: Enhanced Laundry Experience: Elevate your daily laundry routine with the exceptional features of our product. This carefully designed product aims to redefine the way you dry and care for your clothes. Durable Design for Year-Round Use: Crafted with durability in mind, this weather-resistant washing line boasts a clear PVC coating and synthetic cord reinforcement, providing unparalleled strength. Its robust core ensures a long lifespan, making it an ideal choice for continuous, year-round use. Spacious 20-Meter Length: Enjoy the convenience of a generous 20-meter length, offering ample space for hanging multiple garments simultaneously. This feature ensures efficient air-drying without the hassle of space constraints, providing a practical solution for households of all sizes. Versatile Usage, Indoors and Outdoors: Adaptability is key, and our versatile laundry rope delivers just that. Whether you prefer the freshness of outdoor drying or the convenience of indoor solutions, this product effortlessly adapts to your needs. Experience the flexibility of a laundry solution that caters to your lifestyle. Effortless Installation for Convenience: Say goodbye to complicated setups. Our laundry rope is designed for easy installation, ensuring a hassle-free experience for users. Enjoy the convenience of a product that not only performs exceptionally but also simplifies the process of keeping your clothes fresh and dry. In summary, this product combines durability, versatility, and convenience, offering a superior solution for efficient and effective clothes drying, regardless of the season or living space.
